# Estate Agent Newsletters

> Estate Agent Newsletters is a done-for-you monthly email service for UK estate agents. We write and send a monthly market update to an agency's existing database of old contacts, so those people remember the agency when they come to sell. The agency does nothing. £149 per month, one agent per area.

## The problem it solves

Every estate agency CRM is full of people who enquired two to five years ago and then went quiet: buyers the agency sold to, vendors who never went ahead, and valuations that never happened. Many still live nearby and already know the agency. But teams are busy with today's deals, so nobody follows up, the contact goes cold, and the database sits unused. Every year some of those homeowners decide to sell, and they use another agent simply because the first agent slipped their mind.

## What the service does

We write and send one email a month to the agency's database. Once a month with clear, useful market news is enough to keep an agency top of mind.

- We do all the work. There is no software for the agency to learn and no templates to edit.
- No time is required from the agency's team. Nobody has to chase anyone.
- The emails read like a personal note from the agent. They are simple, plain text, and built to land in the main inbox rather than the promotions tab.

## Inside every monthly update

- The national picture: what is happening to mortgage rates, prices, and how many homes are selling, in plain English.
- Local numbers: what homes sold for near the recipient, and how quickly they sold.
- Useful advice: practical tips on getting a home ready to sell, or looking after a rental.

## The 2% rule

A database is only worth something if it is used. On a database of 5,000 old contacts, if 2 in every 100 get back in touch, that is 100 people back in the agency's pipeline, and 100 local homeowners talking to them again. The agency already owns those contacts and did not pay anyone for them.

## How it works

1. The agency sends its list, or lets us connect to its CRM.
2. We tidy the list, handle the GDPR side, and set up a separate sending address so the agency's normal email stays safe.
3. We add the agency's logo, write the content, and send the emails.

## Pricing and terms

- £149 per month.
- One agent per area. Once an agency claims its postcodes, no other agent nearby can use the service.
- We set everything up: the list, the sending address, and the monthly send.
- GDPR compliant. The agency's database stays theirs and is never shared.
- No contracts. Cancel anytime.

## Get started

- An agent can check whether their postcode is still available and request a free mockup of their own monthly update.
- Contact: hello@estateagentnewsletters.co.uk

## Links

- [Home](https://estateagentnewsletters.co.uk/): Landing page explaining the service, the 2% rule, pricing and terms.
